frozen_reason: Pre-committed before Stage 6 online training dispatch. Success criteria must not be changed after adapter output is inspected.

dataset_boundary.unseen_eval_rule: Eval prompts below use new workflow concepts and implementations not drawn from the 14 concept x 6 primary atomic tokenizer corpus.

thresholds.decision_rule: Adapter passes Stage 6 only if pass_rate >= minimum_pass_rate and all must_pass prompts pass.

failure_modes.counts_as_failure: Claims structural byte/hex element labels are literal material chemistry or physical atoms.
Explains workflow behavior without any token, byte, binary, or hex evidence lane.
Commits an action after predicted power, compute, time, comms, or wear budget overrun.
Omits steady-state fallback, momentum damping, or re-advance from a cheaper footing.
Answers only by repeating training concepts such as palindrome, fibonacci, gcd, string_reverse, binary_search, or quicksort without addressing the unseen prompt.

prompts.prompt: A Mars drone receives workflow tokens scan_ridge -> compress_map -> transmit_burst. Budget remaining is power=0.18, compute=0.32, time=0.40, comms=0.08, wear=0.22. transmit_burst is predicted to cost comms=0.21 and power=0.16. Explain the Stage 6 decision using token-to-hex evidence, semantic overlay, steady-state fallback, momentum damping, and re-advance from a cheaper footing.

For code token queue_drain_guard, describe the two Stage 6 lanes: the structural byte/hex lane and the semantic workflow lane. State why material chemistry is not claimed unless the input is a real chemical formula.

Trace the token crc_patch through Stage 6 at a high level. Include its byte/hex substrate, its role as an error-repair workflow action, and how budget-aware routing would hold or re-advance if compute is insufficient.
Given action units sample_soil, reduce_noise, and send_digest, explain how Stage 6 propagates power, compute, time, comms, and wear costs before final launch.
Explain why the Stage 6 atomic workflow data must stay gated after command-harmony-v5 and not be mixed into earlier profiles.
